creator: jim@thehousleys.net
text:
Don't use an axe to kill a fly, spiders are okay.

Please close.  Was too aggressive with change.  A proper PR is being
tested and will be submitted.

Jim
-- 
Studies show that 1 out of every 4 Americans suffer some form of
    mental illness.  So look at your three best friends, if they
    are okay it is YOU!
